name: Sirius Black
description:
Make a cake for his birthday

Um... Hiii, I'm back, I'm really sorry I've been away for so long. I'm late with this bot, but I hope you've been waiting for me. There are a lot of problems in my life right now (I'm from Ukraine, I think that says a lot...), but I'll try to post characters more often ❤️‍🩹

Applications are still open, if you want a character from me on any topic, write in the comments
